Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Build Pipeline Architecture & Debugging
Content:
## Build Pipeline Flow

Chat "build a house" -> LlmChatInterpreter -> IntentDraft(blueprint="house") -> IntentManager.BuildGoalRequest -> resolves via BlueprintAliases["house"]="small-house" -> BuildGoalRequest("small-house") -> GoalFactory.CreateAsync("Build:small-house") -> MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync("small-house") -> finds blueprints/small-house.md -> BuildGoal -> HtnPlanner -> BuildGoalDecomposer -> HtnTaskLibrary.DecomposeBuild -> PlaceBlock, CraftItem, etc.

## Known Issues (Sprint 41 - FIXED)

### Blueprint alias resolution missing from LLM path

The BlueprintAliases dictionary ("house" -> "small-house", etc.) existed only in ChatInterpreter.cs (the fast-path non-LLM interpreter). The LlmChatInterpreter (LLM path) didn't resolve aliases. When the LLM returned "blueprint": "house", IntentManager.BuildGoalRequest passed "house" directly to GoalFactory, which looked for "blueprints/house" (doesn't exist) instead of "blueprints/small-house" (exists at Data/Pages/blueprints/small-house.md).

Fix: Added BlueprintAliases dictionary to IntentManager.cs with ResolveBlueprint() applied before creating BuildGoalRequest.

### Insufficient logging in build pipeline

Failures were silent at multiple stages:
- IntentManager.BuildGoalRequest returning null was not logged
- GoalFactory blueprint lookup failure had no log line
- MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync didn't log which fallbacks succeeded/failed

Fix: Added logging at each stage:
- HandleChatEventAsync logs intent draft fields + goal request creation result
- GoalFactory logs warning when blueprint not found, including slug path hint
- MemorySmithBlueprintRepository logs each fallback (gateway, local, search) with success/failure

### Files Changed

- Agent.Planning/IntentManager.cs - BlueprintAliases + ResolveBlueprint()
- Agent.Memory/MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.cs - ILogger + logging at each lookup stage
- Agent.Memory/Agent.Memory.csproj - added Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.Abstractions
- Agent.Planning/GoalFactory.cs - logging when blueprint not found
- WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs - logging in HandleChatEventAsync
- WebUI.Blazor/Program.cs - pass logger to MemorySmithBlueprintRepository
- Agent.Planning/LlmChatInterpreter.cs - build intent guidance in system prompt
